The '''Primarin Starshipwrights Union''' was a union of [[starshipwright]]s that shared its name with<ref name="AIR" /> the [[Primarin system/Legends|Primarin system]] of the [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim]].<ref name="EAOC">{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}}</ref> It produced a [[Sensor array/Legends|sensor array]] that came to serve as the primary of such arrays in the unique, cannibalized [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] ''[[Cannibal]]'' of [[Barosa Warren]], the head of the [[Galactic Outdoor Survival School/Legends|Galactic Outdoor Survival School]].<ref name="AIR" /> By [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]],<ref name="Date">''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]'' represents a collection of [[in-universe]] reports from "one [[Standard year/Legends|year]] before the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]]," which corresponds to [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]], according to ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''.</ref> the Primarin Starshipwrights Union had ceased to exist.<ref name="AIR" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Primarin Starshipwrights Union was mentioned in ''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]'', a [[1995]] sourcebook for [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="AIR" />
